chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Examples**:
- A new user registers and places their first order
- An existing customer updates their shipping address

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
PRODUCT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: A tangible or digital item offered for sale on the platform.

**Business Context**: Products are the core items that customers purchase. They are organized into categories and have inventory tracked across warehouses.

**Key Attribut... [TRUNCATED]

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
SALES ORDER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products.

**Business Context**: Orders are created when customers complete checkout. They track the customer, items, payment status, and delivery information.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Order ID
- References exactly one Customer
- Order date when... [TRUNCATED]

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER LINE ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase.

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordere... [TRUNCATED]

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
PAYMENT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: The monetary transaction that settles the total amount due for a Sales Order.

**Business Context**: Payments authorize and transfer funds from the customer to the platform. Multiple payment methods are supported.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Payment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer)
- Paymen... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Shipments represent the logistics side of order fulfillment. They track what items were sent, when, and to whom.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Shipment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Source Warehouse
- Destination Customer Address
- Shipped timestamp
- Tracking number
- Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED

**Business Rules**:
- Can only be created for confirmed orders with payment
- One order may have multiple partial shipments
- Delivery address mu... [TRUNCATED]

Customer Relationships:
- A Customer places zero or more Sales Orders
- A Customer has one or more Customer Addresses (not in simplified schema)

Product Relationships:
- A Product belongs to exactly one Category
- A Product appears on zero or more Order Line Items

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relatio... [TRUNCATED]

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO |
| SKU | VARCHAR(50) | Stock Keeping Unit code | NO |
| PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO |
| CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO |
| UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO |
| IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether currently for sale | NO |

**Foreign Keys**:
... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- PARENT_CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID) [self-reference]

**Business Concept Mapping**: Category

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
SALES_ORDER_HDR
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Header record for each customer sales order.

**Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| ORDER_ID | BIGI... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
PAYMENT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Monetary transactions settling order amounts.

**Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PAYMENT_ID | BIGINT | Unique payment identifier | NO |
| ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Order being paid | NO |
| PAYMENT_METHOD | VARCHAR(50) | Credit car... [TRUNCATED]

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
SHIPMENT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Physical delivery of products to customers.

**Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| SHIPMENT_ID | BIGINT | Unique shipment identifier | NO |
| ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Order being fulfilled | NO |
| WAREHOUSE_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | Sou... [TRUNCATED]

═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

RELATIONSHIP SUMMARY
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPP... [TRUNCATED]

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR
OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM
Category         → TB_CATEGORY
Payment          → PAYMENT
Shipment         → SHIPMENT

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID | - Valid email address (required for login) | - One or more delivery/billing addresses | - Geographic region for tax calculation | - Active/inactive status | - Must place at least one order to remain active | - Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | - Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | - A new user registers and places their first order | - An existing customer updates their shipping address | - Order #12345 for Customer #10001 containing 3 items | Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. | They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments.
